name: Monster Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and peanut butter together until smooth.
2. Add the sugars and beat until mixed.
3. Add the eggs and beat until creamy.
4. Add the corn syrup, baking soda, and vanilla and beat until combined.
5. Stir in the oatmeal and add the M&M's.
6. Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.
